sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 메드트로닉은 2026 회계연도 3분기 매출 90억 달러를 기록하며 10분기 만에 최대 매출 성장률을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출은 90억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 8.7% 증가했으며, 유기적 성장률은 6.0%를 기록하여 가이던스를 50포인트 상회했습니다.
심혈관 포트폴리오가 11% 성장하고 당뇨 사업부가 8.3% 성장하는 등 주요 사업부의 고른 성장이 실적을 견인했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 심장 절제 솔루션 부문은 펄스장 절제(PFA) 포트폴리오의 강세로 80%의 매출 성장을 기록했습니다.
Hugo 로봇 수술 시스템 및 Stealth AXiS 수술 시스템에 대한 미국 FDA 승인을 획득하며 기술 포트폴리오를 확장했습니다.
CathWorks 및 Anteris 인수를 통해 관상동맥, 신장 신경 차단 및 구조적 심장 분야의 M&A 전략을 실행했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: GAAP 기준 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.89달러, 비GAAP 기준 희석 EPS는 1.36달러를 기록했습니다.
심혈관 포트폴리오 매출은 34억 5,700만 달러, 신경과학 포트폴리오는 25억 5,800만 달러를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 회사가 제시한 2026 회계연도 유기적 매출 성장 및 EPS 가이던스 달성 여부를 지속적으로 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991-fy26q3earningsr.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 NEWS RELEASE FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Medtronic reports strong third quarter fiscal 2026 results with highest enterprise revenue growth in 10 quarters Cardiovascular portfolio up 11% year-over-year; Cardiac Ablation Solutions grew 80% on strength of pulsed field ablation portfolio GALWAY, Ireland – February 17, 2026 – Medtronic plc (NYSE: MDT), a global leader in healthcare technology, today announced financial results for its third quarter (Q3) of fiscal year 2026 (FY26), which ended January 23, 2026. Q3 Key Highlights • Revenue of $9.0 billion, increased 8.7% as reported and 6.0% organic, 50 basis points ahead of Q3 guidance • GAAP diluted EPS of $0.89; non-GAAP diluted EPS of $1.36, three cents ahead of Q3 guidance mid-point • Company reiterates FY26 organic revenue growth and EPS guidance • Car  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.0 billion = 90억 달러; $9.0 = 9.0달러; $0.89 = 0.89달러; $1.36 = 1.36달러; 50 basis points = 50포인트.

revenue increased 80%, including 137% in the U.S., on strength of pulsed field ablation (PFA) portfolio • Secured CE Mark for Sphere-360™ and initiated U.S. pivotal trial 1 • Secured U.S. FDA clearance for Hugo™ robotic-assisted surgery; first cases completed this month • Secured U.S. FDA clearance for Stealth AXiS™ Surgical System for spinal procedures • Diabetes revenue increased 8.3% led by double-digit strength in International markets • Executing M&A strategy with two key transactions in the quarter: CathWorks in Coronary and Renal Denervation and Anteris in Structural Heart “Q3 marks another strong quarter, delivering 6% organic revenue growth, ahead of guidance, demonstrating the strength of our portfolio,” said Geoff Martha, Medtronic chairman and chief executive officer. “By unlocking new markets and investing in high-growth opportunities, we are accelerating performance across

the company. Our innovation pipeline and portfolio breadth give us confidence in our ability to sustain long-term growth. It’s an exciting time for Medtronic.” Financial Results Medtronic reported Q3 worldwide revenue of $9.017 billion, an increase of 8.7% as reported and 6.0% on an organic basis. The organic revenue growth comparison excludes: • Other revenue of $32 million in the current year and $32 million in the prior year • Revenue from the Dutch Obesity Clinic (NOK) divestiture with no revenue in the current year and $15 million in the prior year • Foreign exchange benefit of $242 million on the remaining segments Q3 revenue by segment included: • Cardiovascular Portfolio revenue of $3.457 billion, an increase of 13.8% as reported and 10  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.017 billion = 90억 1,700만 달러; $32 million = 3,200만 달러; $15 million = 1,500만 달러; $242 million = 2억 4,200만 달러; $3.457 billion = 34억 5,700만 달러; $9.017 = 9.017달러; $32 = 32달러; $15 = 15달러; $3.457 = 3.457달러; $242 = 242달러.

igit increase in Coronary & Peripheral Vascular, all on an organic basis 2 • Neuroscience Portfolio revenue of $2.558 billion, an increase of 4.1% reported and 2.5% organic, with mid-single digit increase in Neuromodulation, mid-single digit increase in Cranial & Spinal Technologies, and flat result in Specialty Therapies, all on an organic basis • Medical Surgical Portfolio revenue of $2.173 billion, an increase of 4.9% as reported and 2.7% organic, with low-single digit increase in Surgical & Endoscopy, and high-single digit increase in Acute Care & Monitoring, all on an organic basis • Diabetes business revenue of $796 million, an increase of 14.8% as reported and 8.3% organic Q3 GAAP operating profit and operating margin were $1.464 billion and 16.2%, respectively  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.558 billion = 25억 5,800만 달러; $2.173 billion = 21억 7,300만 달러; $796 million = 7억 9,600만 달러; $1.464 billion = 14억 6,400만 달러; $2.558 = 2.558달러; $2.173 = 2.173달러; $796 = 796달러; $1.464 = 1.464달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
